Discourse/semantic feature: Speaker is setting up a conditional justification for excess, anticipating a circumstance that warrants indulgence.

Genre/register feature: Informal first-person blog style with colloquial language and a pop-culture (NASCAR) reference.

Final-token constraint: The determiner "the" requires a following singular countable noun (or noun phrase) to form a grammatical NP.
